mom

like 500-750 words. its not super long but I want it to be good

ok cool
Oh and Sam?
yeah?

MOM

aw thats sweet

wait but what about the tamales lol

sofias paella was actually so good

also aunt rosas tres leches omg

Oh?

yeah exactly
Oh, did you send Professor Chen your personal statement yet?
YES I sent it last night actually. she said she'd look at it this week
Oh wonderful! How do you feel about it?
pretty good honestly. it felt really personal to write about the crisis center stuff
I'm sure it's beautiful. You've always been good with words.
lol ok mom
What! It's true!
haha ok ok. thanks ❤️
How's everything else? Are you eating properly?
yes mom I eat like 3 meals a day I promise
OK good. Love you. Have a good rest of your week.
mom I'm freaking out
What happened?! Are you OK?
yeah sorry I'm fine. its just the applications

oh thats great mom!!

aw thats cute. couple goals

fingers crossed 🤞

and the instructor said I have a natural feel for the wheel

Thank you baby. You focus on those apps!
I will I will byeee

OH SAM!! 🎉🎉

dec 20th. driving down with Jake actually hes going to Sacramento too
Jake the pottery friend?

can't wait ❤️

haha we're getting boba later. love u too!

yeah jake just dropped me off. back in davis

it was really nice. thanks for everything mom

omg really?? that makes me so happy

perf 🌿

UCLA is basically done. submitting tomorrow
